name: Carne Gisada Con Papas (Meat & Potatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut round steak into cubes and brown in shortening in a heavy skillet or Dutch oven.
2. Peel and cube potatoes (approximately 1/2-inch cubes).
3. Once the meat is lightly browned, add the potatoes and continue to brown. (If it sticks to the bottom of the skillet, that's okay.)
4. Add tomato sauce, salt, pepper, cumin powder, and garlic.
5. Add approximately one cup of water.
6. Simmer until the meat and potatoes are tender. The potatoes will thicken the sauce.
